title: Didymocarpus asperifolius
taxonomy: Didymocarpus asperifolius is classified under the family Gesneriaceae. This family of plants is commonly known as the African violet family. Didymocarpus asperifolius is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the genus Didymocarpus. The genus Didymocarpus is a group of epiphytic plants native to tropical Asia. The classification of Didymocarpus asperifolius reflects its unique characteristics and its relationship to other plants within the Gesneriaceae family.
